Generate documents (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, ODS: Generate documents (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, ODS, and more) from templates and JSON data using the Carbone report generator.
\nTo get your Carbone API key:\n1. Log i:
To get your Carbone API key:
1. Log in to your [Carbone account](https://account.carbone.io/)
2. Navigate to **API keys** in your account settings.
3. Create or copy your API key.
Render a Carbone template with JSON data: Render a Carbone template with JSON data and download the generated document.
Upload a template file to Carbone and ge: Upload a template file to Carbone and get a template ID for rendering.
Delete a Carbone template by its ID.
Update the metadata of an existing Carbo: Update the metadata of an existing Carbone template.
Retrieve a list of deployed Carbone temp: Retrieve a list of deployed Carbone templates with filtering and pagination.
List all categories used to organize you: List all categories used to organize your Carbone templates.
List all tags used to organize your Carb: List all tags used to organize your Carbone templates.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
JSON object containing the data to injec: JSON object containing the data to inject into the template. Keys must match the `{d.variableName}` placeholders in your template.
Output format (e.g. `pdf`, `xlsx`, `csv`: Output format (e.g. `pdf`, `xlsx`, `csv`, `docx`). For PDF, you can also use advanced options via JSON like `{"formatName":"pdf","formatOptions":{"Watermark":"Confidential"}}`.
Locale for number/date formatting (e.g. `en-us`, `fr-fr`, `de-de`). Defaults to `en-us`.
PDF converter engine: **L** (LibreOffice: PDF converter engine: **L** (LibreOffice, default - best balance), **O** (OnlyOffice - ideal for DOCX/XLSX/PPTX), **C** (Chromium - high-fidelity HTML-to-PDF). Only applies when convertTo is "pdf" or an object with formatName "pdf".
Timezone for date formatting (e.g. `Euro: Timezone for date formatting (e.g. `Europe/Paris`, `America/New_York`). Defaults to UTC.
Custom filename for the generated docume: Custom filename for the generated document. Can use template variables like `{d.date}`. Returned in Content-Disposition header.
Extra data object merged into template w: Extra data object merged into template with tags `{c.}` (complement prefix).
Source currency code (e.g. `EUR`) for cu: Source currency code (e.g. `EUR`) for currency conversion. Use with Currency Target and Currency Rates.
Target currency code (e.g. `USD`) for cu: Target currency code (e.g. `USD`) for currency conversion. Used by formatC formatter.
Exchange rates object for currency conve: Exchange rates object for currency conversion. Example: `{"EUR": 1, "USD": 1.14}`.
Supported formats: DOCX, XLSX, ODS, ODT,: Supported formats: DOCX, XLSX, ODS, ODT, PPTX, CSV, HTML.
The filename including extension (e.g. `: The filename including extension (e.g. `invoice-template.docx`). The extension determines the output format.
If enabled (default), creates a template: If enabled (default), creates a template ID that can hold multiple versions. If disabled, creates a standalone template (legacy mode).
If provided, adds this upload as a new v: If provided, adds this upload as a new version to an existing template ID. Only works when versioning is enabled.
Description or notes about the template.
Replace tags with a new list.
UTC Unix timestamp for when this version: UTC Unix timestamp for when this version should be considered deployed. Values >= 42000000000 (year 3300) = "NOW". Used to determine active version.
UTC Unix timestamp for when to delete th: UTC Unix timestamp for when to delete the template. Values >= 42000000000 (year 3300) = "now". This effectively schedules deletion.
Filter by specific Template ID (64-bit f: Filter by specific Template ID (64-bit format). Exact match.
Filter by specific Version ID (SHA256 fo: Filter by specific Version ID (SHA256 format). Exact match.
Fuzzy search in template name, or exact: Fuzzy search in template name, or exact match for ID/Version ID.
If checked, returns all versions for a s: If checked, returns all versions for a specific template ID (when ID filter is provided).
Maximum number of templates to return. D: Maximum number of templates to return. Default is 100.
Pagination cursor for fetching the next: Pagination cursor for fetching the next set of results.
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
